title: wolfhsm crate: core API
description: Add wolfhsm workspace crate with safe Rust API for the wolfHSM client. Modules: error.rs (WolfHsmError enum mapping WH_ERROR_* constants, check() helper), transport.rs (Tcp/Shm/Uds/Tls enum), client.rs (Client wrapping RefCell<Box<whClientContext>>, connect/echo/info/Drop), key.rs (KeyId newtype, evict/commit/erase/revoke/wrap helpers), nvm.rs (NvmObject, available/list/read/write/delete/find_by_label — handle NOTFOUND as loop termination, write must destroy-then-add), counter.rs (Counter RAII handle, init/increment/read/reset/destroy), cryptocb.rs (DEV_ID=0x57484D53, register() returning CryptoCbGuard RAII, AtomicBool double-registration guard).
